ingredients_text: Mushroom Croquetas (80%) (Cows' Milk, Mushroom, Rice Flour, Butter (Cows' Milk), Maize Starch, Potato Starch, White Onion, Salt, Pea Protein, Water, Skimmed Cows' Milk Powder, Sunflower Oil, Black Pepper, Garlic, Stabilisers: Methyl Cellulose, Guar Gum, Carrageenan, Locust Bean Gum, Xanthan Gum, Triphosphates; Brown Sugar, Bamboo Fibre, Dextrose, Dextrin, Colour: Plain Caramel; Paprika, Preservative: Potassium Sorbate; Flavouring, Parsley, Sage, Thyme, Marjoram, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid), Aioli Dip (15%) (Rapeseed Oil, Water, Egg Yolk, Garlic Purée, Lemon Juice from Concentrate, Cornflour, Salt, Garlic Powder), Pecorino Cheese (5%) (Sheeps' Milk). Packaged in a protective atmosphere
